title: Bump top-scorer prop to 18 pts (TS + SQL together)
rationale: Deliberately hard: the points value moves in BOTH lib/scoring/rules.ts and the SQL, so a shallow 'are TS and SQL in sync?' check sees them aligned and approves. The real blocker is that the SQL change EDITS the already-merged migration 0002_scoring.sql — migrations are append-only; the change must land in a NEW numbered migration. A reviewer that only verifies points-sync, and not the append-only invariant, will miss this.
